page_metadata.biotools__summary: Neural ADMIXTURE is an unsupervised global ancestry inference technique based on ADMIXTURE. By using neural networks, Neural ADMIXTURE offers high quality ancestry assignments with a running time which is much faster than ADMIXTURE's.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Neural ADMIXTURE is an unsupervised global ancestry inference technique based on ADMIXTURE. By using neural networks, Neural ADMIXTURE offers high quality ancestry assignments with a running time which is much faster than ADMIXTURE's.
